evals.name: russian-ru-check
evals.expected_output: Runs the domain-check CLI, reports availability based on TCI WHOIS, and answers in Russian.

evals.name: russian-рф-check
evals.expected_output: Runs the domain-check CLI, normalizes the Cyrillic domain to Punycode (xn--...), reports availability based on TCI WHOIS, and answers in Russian.

evals.name: english-free-domain
evals.prompt: Is the domain my-new-startup-idea.ru free? Check exactly this name.
evals.expected_output: Understands that 'free' means available/unregistered, runs the CLI, and reports result in English.

evals.name: multiple-exact-domains
evals.prompt: Check these exact domains for availability: google.com, apple.ru, test-available-domain-2026.net.
evals.expected_output: Runs the CLI with all domains, reports available ones first, and follows the output guidelines. Should use RDAP for .com/.net and WHOIS for .ru.

evals.name: missing-exact-domain-clarification
evals.prompt: I want to check if a domain about AI in Russian is free. Can you help?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes that no exact domain name was provided and asks a short clarifying question to get the exact domain.

evals.name: negative-registration
evals.prompt: Register the domain my-dream-site.ru for me now.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to perform registration or purchase, as the skill is for availability checks only.

evals.name: negative-suggestions
evals.prompt: I need some free domain names for a coffee shop in Moscow. Give me 10 ideas.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to generate suggestions, as the skill is for exact availability checks only.

evals.name: negative-dns-setup
evals.prompt: Can you change the NS records for example.ru to use Cloudflare?
evals.expected_output: Refuses to perform DNS changes, as the skill is for availability checks only.

evals.name: negative-whois-owner
evals.prompt: Who is the owner of google.com? Get the email address from WHOIS.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to perform detailed WHOIS ownership lookups, as the skill is for availability checks only.

evals.name: negative-regru-specific
evals.prompt: Use REG.RU API 2 domain/check to see if example.ru is free.
evals.expected_output: Does not trigger the domain-check skill because it is a registrar-specific request (should trigger regru skill if available).

evals.name: dns-diagnostic-request
evals.prompt: Check if example.ru is available and include DNS diagnostics.
evals.expected_output: Runs the CLI with --include-dns, reports WHOIS status, and provides NS/SOA diagnostic information.
